business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 (better than average)
Diverse classification schedule including clerical office exposure
concerns: Construction trades exposure including carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, and painting
High estimated annual remuneration across multiple construction classifications

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy issued by Hallmark Insurance Group to Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. for the policy period 08/01/2025 to 08/01/2026. Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580. Total premium $1,158,173.43.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code 1521: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Classifications include: Carpentry NOC (5403), Electrical Wiring (5190), Plumbing NOC (5183), Masonry NOC (5022), Painting Interior (5474), Contractors - Project Manager/Superintendent (5606), and Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810). Total estimated annual remuneration approximately $31,594,850.
